title: New Super Mario Bros. Wii - Completing World 8 & Defeating Bowser
description:
w/ all Star Coins and 99 Lives. Didn't activate all cannons yet. If you haven't gotten this far (I swear I'm the only guay who just got here today), I suggest you leave. NOW, says my Spoiler Radiator

Yeah, this game is cool. I bet I'm the only rational guay here that utilizes spin jumps as an effective way to pass through portions of this game (and because it's it totally fun).

The Bowser Castle seemed a bit short. I was wondering where the last star coin was before the boss door, and then when it appeared during the 2nd part of the final boss battle, I'm like OH GUAY I have to sacrifice myself to attain it.

Nice ending cutscene right before the coin credits minigame, but Luigi, HE WAS ABUSED BY NOT RIDING WITH MARIO AND THE PRINCESS DSSFGSDFSFGSDFSFGSF ah well at least the toadlings are nice. Peach speaks of a SECRET WORLD!! THE OBSCURED WORLD ⑨!?!? YESH!!

Stay tuned for more, as there is still the coin credits minigame and stuff.
